Router: Internal content-manager UI bug fix (event.preventDefault). Single-line fix for browser default behavior. No user-facing behavior change or API modification.

Router: Internal content-manager UI bug fix for drag-and-drop preview behavior. The fix ensures the preview doesn't disappear during drag operations. This is a visual bug fix with no user-facing API or feature changes.

Router: Bug fix in the OpenAPI generation plugin. The fix corrects the plugin to generate parameter types matching the actual API specification (documentId as string, not number). The REST API documentation at cms/api/rest already correctly documents IDs as strings. This is an internal plugin fix with no new user-facing behavior requiring docs updates.

Router: Bug fix to preserve self-referential relations during publish/discard operations. The existing Draft & Publish documentation at cms/features/draft-and-publish.md already covers the feature. This fix corrects the implementation to match the documented behavior (relations should be preserved). No new user-facing features or API changes require documentation updates.

Router: Internal database migration fix with no change to user-facing behavior, APIs, or configuration. The idempotency improvements and error handling are implementation details of the internal 5.0.0-02-created-document-id migration that don't require user documentation.

Router: Internal bug fix for review workflows. The fix ensures stage/assignee selection correctly respects locale params in i18n-enabled content types. No new functionality or API changes - the behavior aligns with what's already documented. Documentation does not need updates.

Router: Internal admin UI styling fix that addresses a rendering bug (double scrollbar in list view). This is an implementation detail of the OverflowingItem styled component and does not introduce new user-facing features, APIs, or behavior changes. Users do not interact with or configure this component directly. No documentation update needed.

Router: Internal bug fix in content manager crash handling when viewing history of entries with deleted dynamic zone components. No public API change, no new user-facing behavior — just fixes an unexpected crash.

Router: Internal framework migration from Yup to Zod for server-side validation schemas. This is implementation detail, not a user-facing API or configuration change.

Router: UI/CSS fix in Content Manager's Dynamic Zone component picker. Addresses a visual overflow issue where long component names without spaces would bleed into adjacent cards. This is a visual/UX improvement with no impact on documented behavior, features, or APIs.
Router: Internal admin UI bug fix for Prism.js library loading issue in Code block component. No public API or user-facing behavior change.

Router: Database query helper bug fix for morph relation population. Internal correctness fix ensuring morphTo relations return correct type discriminator; not a new feature or breaking change requiring user documentation.

Router: Internal bug fix in query parameter validation. Throws correct HTTP status code (400 Bad Request instead of 500) for invalid user input — no public API surface change. Error messages remain unchanged and user-facing behavior is already documented.
